name: The Lost Pope

sheet.name: The Lost Pope
sheet.background_story:
The Devotee's of Mother Agora represent the Highest Priests of Yogg's Tower.

Their flesh is seared by Her Knowledge creating blinding, sublime pain... Their mask represents the splitting open of their very corporeal form in order to expose their souls to Her True Vision.

They are said to communicate through visions transmitted to their followers.

Their tongue no longer produce sounds recognizable to mortals.

The Pope was lost in the Great Bonfire of the 18th Cycle for unknown reasons.
